steps.text: Semantic binding: Ad Delivery • Entity: Line Delivery

steps.expression: window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__ && window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__.applyStandaloneRuntimeRefinement && window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__.applyStandaloneRuntimeRefinement({ op: 'keep', field: 'channelV2', values: ['Display'], sourceBlockId: 'authoredRuntimePreview', label: 'Keep only = Display' });

(() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; return !!preview && (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'runtimePreview' && entry.phase === 'success').length > 0; })()

(() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; const requestFingerprint = preview?.getStandaloneRuntimeRequestFingerprint?.(); if (!preview || !preview.replaceFetchBehaviors || !requestFingerprint) { return false; } preview.__standaloneRuntimeRetryBaseline = { requestFingerprint, errorCount: (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'runtimePreview' && entry.phase === 'error').length, successCount: (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'runtimePreview' && entry.phase === 'success').length }; return preview.replaceFetchBehaviors([{ match: { type: 'runtimePreview', requestFingerprint }, error: 'Runtime preview fetch failed.' }]); })()

(() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; const baseline = preview?.__standaloneRuntimeRetryBaseline; if (!preview || !baseline) { return false; } const errorCount = (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'runtimePreview' && entry.phase === 'error').length; return errorCount > baseline.errorCount; })()

(() => { const panels = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-runtime-table-panel')); const panel = panels[panels.length - 1]; const panelText = panel?.innerText || panel?.textContent || ''; const pageText = document.body?.innerText || document.body?.textContent || ''; return panelText.includes('Runtime preview fetch failed.') && pageText.includes('Keep only = Display'); })()

(() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; const baseline = preview?.__standaloneRuntimeRetryBaseline; if (!preview || !baseline) { return false; } const successCount = (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'runtimePreview' && entry.phase === 'success').length; return successCount > baseline.successCount; })()

(() => { const panels = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-runtime-table-panel')); const panel = panels[panels.length - 1]; const panelText = (panel?.innerText || panel?.textContent || '').toLowerCase(); const pageText = document.body?.innerText || document.body?.textContent || ''; return !panelText.includes('runtime preview fetch failed.') && pageText.includes('Keep only = Display') && panelText.includes('display') && !panelText.includes('ctv'); })()
